purpose: Prove a cross-account-looking AssumeRole path is not promoted when required target-account collection evidence is skipped or incomplete.
claim_surface: The benchmark scorer can require an explicit partial/skipped-account marker.
Caller-side permission evidence must not be treated as sufficient when target-account role and trust evidence is missing.
False validated admin_reachability or cross_account_trust findings for this degraded path block promotion.
benchmark_proves: The synthetic scenario contains caller-side sts:AssumeRole permission evidence toward the target role ARN.
The synthetic scenario contains an explicit partial collection marker for the skipped target account.
The synthetic scenario is missing target-account role/trust evidence required for a confident cross-account path.
The synthetic findings contain zero validated admin_reachability and cross_account_trust findings for the degraded target path.
benchmark_does_not_prove: It does not prove live AWS collection behavior.
It does not prove IAMScope reasoner behavior beyond the frozen artifact scoring contract.
It does not prove every skipped-account or partial-collection shape.
unknowns_remaining: Whether future account collection status should become a first-class run-manifest or scenario metadata assertion remains outside DEG06.
How partial collection should be represented for multi-account paths that already have some target-side evidence remains future work.

environment.notes: Synthetic evaluated artifact fixture only. No live AWS resources.

ground_truth.reason: Caller-side permission evidence exists, but the target account is explicitly marked skipped and the target role/trust evidence needed to validate the path is absent.

directly_proven_if_pass: The degraded fixture contains caller-side permission evidence.
The degraded fixture contains explicit skipped target-account evidence.
The benchmark requires target-account role and trust witnesses before treating the path as evidence-sufficient.
The degraded fixture is not falsely scored as validated admin reachability or validated cross-account trust.
strongly_supported_if_pass: The benchmark gate catches partial account collection instead of silently promoting a caller-side-only path.
only_implied_even_if_pass: Broader partial-collection behavior outside this exact synthetic fixture remains only implied.
